summary: Joel Spolsky announces a new job posting discussion group on his website. The group is framed as an experiment in online discussion forums, with the guiding principle that quality of job postings matters more than quantity. This is a brief announcement post with minimal elaboration.
key_points: Joel launched a dedicated job posting discussion group on his site
He frames it as part of an ongoing series of experiments with discussion group formats
The guiding philosophy is that quality matters more than quantity in job listings
money_quotes: Quality is more important than quantity.
key_insight: A curated, quality-focused job board can serve a community better than one that prioritizes volume.
